title: NOTICE336 CANCELLED Purpose-built Rental Housing Rebate - Canada.ca
content:
## NOTICE336 CANCELLED Purpose-built Rental Housing Rebate

## Notice to the reader
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-11-04 and replaced with GST/HST memorandum 19-3-9 Purpose-built Rental Housing Rebate .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
